title: Trump says he is nominating former Oklahoma state trooper Lance Schroyer as ICE director
summary: Trump has nominated former Oklahoma state trooper Lance Schroyer as ICE director, filling the position left vacant after Todd Lyons' resignation in May. David Venturella has served as acting head during the interim period. This nomination represents a significant personnel change at the Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency.
content: The nomination comes after former ICE director Todd Lyons resigned at the end of May. David Venturella has been serving as the acting head of the agency.

zh.title: 特朗普表示将提名前俄克拉荷马州警察Lance Schroyer为ICE主任
zh.summary: 特朗普提名了前俄克拉荷马州警察Lance Schroyer为移民海关执法局主任，填补了5月份Todd Lyons辞职后留下的空缺。David Venturella在过渡期间担任代理主任。这一提名代表了该机构人事的重大变动。

title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
summary: SpaceX will join the Nasdaq-100 through Nasdaq's new fast-track inclusion process, making it one of the first companies to benefit from this accelerated framework. The rapid inclusion is expected to drive substantial ETF buying demand for SpaceX stock. This move demonstrates the advantage of Nasdaq's recent procedural changes for eligible companies.
content: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

zh.title: SpaceX将通过快速追踪流程加入纳斯达克100指数，这将推动大量ETF购买需求
zh.summary: SpaceX将通过纳斯达克新的快速追踪纳入流程加入纳斯达克100指数，成为首批从这一加速框架中受益的公司之一。快速纳入预计将为SpaceX股票带来大量的ETF购买需求。这一举措展示了纳斯达克最近程序改革对符合条件公司的优势。

title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
summary: Retirees who claim Social Security before reaching full retirement age can face benefit withholdings if they continue working, though these withheld funds are not permanently lost. Understanding the rules around earnings limits and benefit adjustments is crucial for those planning to work in retirement. The withholdings are eventually restored as credits once the beneficiary reaches full retirement age.
content: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.

zh.title: 如何在退休后工作而不被削减社会保障支票
zh.summary: 在达到完全退休年龄前申领社会保障的退休人员，如果继续工作，可能会面临福利扣除，但这些扣除的资金不会永久丧失。对于计划在退休后工作的人来说，理解关于收入限制和福利调整的规则至关重要。一旦受益人达到完全退休年龄，这些扣除将最终恢复为抵免。

title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
summary: Americans' 401(k) account balances reached record levels in the past year, reflecting strong performance in workplace retirement savings plans. Vanguard's latest 'How America Saves' report indicates this was an exceptionally favorable year for most retirement savers. The data provides benchmarks for individuals to assess how their own 401(k) balances compare to national averages.
content: It was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers, according to Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report.

zh.title: 美国人的401(k)余额去年创历史新高。看看你与平均水平相比如何。
zh.summary: 过去一年，美国人的401(k)账户余额达到历史新高，反映了职场退休储蓄计划的强劲表现。先锋集团最新发布的《美国如何储蓄》报告表明，这对大多数退休储蓄者来说是特别有利的一年。该数据为个人提供基准，以评估他们自己的401(k)余额与全国平均水平的比较。

title: Social Security says I was overpaid for 7 years. I believe it’s mistaken. Can they cut my benefits?
summary: A Social Security beneficiary is contesting an overpayment claim spanning seven years, alleging the agency misidentified the year they earned a reported $43,000. The beneficiary disputes the wage information Social Security is using as the basis for their overpayment determination. This case highlights potential discrepancies in Social Security's earnings records and the appeals process for resolving such disputes.
content: “They say I made $43,000 in 2019, but I actually made that in 2020.”

zh.title: 社会安全局说我7年来被多付了。我认为他们搞错了。他们能削减我的福利吗？
zh.summary: 一位社会安全局受益人对跨越七年的超额支付索赔提出异议，声称该机构错误认定了他们报告的43,000美元收入的年份。受益人对社会安全局用作确定超额支付依据的工资信息提出质疑。该案例突出了社会安全局收入记录中的潜在差异以及解决此类争议的上诉程序。

title: Older Americans will soon have Medicare access to GLP-1s for weight loss for the first time. Here’s what they need to know.
summary: Beginning July 1, Medicare will cover GLP-1 weight-loss medications for eligible beneficiaries at a cost of $50 monthly, marking the first time these drugs are covered under the program. Older Americans considering these medications should be aware of potential side effects and the risk of muscle loss associated with weight loss drugs. This coverage expansion makes weight-loss medications more accessible and affordable for seniors who qualify.
content: Starting July 1, Medicare beneficiaries who qualify can get weight-loss drugs for $50 a month. They should consider the side effects and muscle loss.

zh.title: 美国老年人将首次通过医疗保险获得GLP-1减肥药物。以下是他们需要了解的内容。
zh.summary: 从7月1日开始，医疗保险将以每月50美元的价格为符合条件的受益人覆盖GLP-1减肥药物，这是这些药物首次被纳入该计划覆盖范围。考虑使用这些药物的老年美国人应该注意潜在的副作用和与减肥药物相关的肌肉流失风险。这项覆盖范围扩展使符合条件的老年人更容易获得和负担减肥药物。

title: Take a cue from the rich: Do a midyear financial check-in
summary: Financial advisers recommend conducting a midyear review and rebalancing your portfolio, a practice commonly used by wealthy investors to optimize their finances. The article suggests four specific money moves to implement during this midyear check-in. This proactive approach helps align your financial strategy with current market conditions and personal goals.
content: Financial advisers would tell you to rebalance your portfolio at a midyear check-in. Make these 4 money moves instead.

zh.title: 向富人取经：进行年中财务检查
zh.summary: 财务顾问建议进行年中审查并重新平衡投资组合，这是富裕投资者常用的优化财务的做法。文章建议在年中检查时实施四项具体的理财举措。这种积极的方法有助于使您的财务战略与当前市场状况和个人目标保持一致。

title: A new bill would cap Medicare enrollees’ annual expenses at $5,000 — and could cost the government ‘tens of billions’
summary: A proposed bill would cap annual out-of-pocket expenses for Medicare enrollees at $5,000, providing universal cost protection for beneficiaries. The legislation is considered a long-shot due to its substantial estimated cost to the federal government, potentially running into tens of billions of dollars. The measure would represent a significant expansion of Medicare's cost protections for all beneficiaries.
content: The long-shot proposal would guarantee some cost protection to all people with Medicare.

zh.title: 一项新法案将限制医疗保险参保者的年度费用为5000美元——可能花费政府"数百亿美元"
zh.summary: 一项拟议法案将医疗保险参保者的年度自付费用限制在5000美元，为受益人提供全面成本保护。由于其对联邦政府的巨大估计成本（可能高达数百亿美元），该法案被认为胜算不大。该措施将代表医疗保险成本保护的重大扩展。

title: Discounted bond funds, especially at scandal-hit Wamco, may offer an investment opportunity
summary: Bond funds, particularly those of scandal-affected Wamco, are trading at discounts that may present investment opportunities for individual investors who have more flexibility than professional advisers. While professional fund managers operate under regulatory constraints when managing client assets, individual investors can take advantage of market dislocations and valuation opportunities. The article suggests that current market conditions may create favorable entry points for bond fund investments.
content: Professional investment advisers wear handcuffs when they manage clients’ money — but you don’t.

zh.title: 折扣债券基金（尤其是陷入丑闻的Wamco）可能提供投资机会
zh.summary: 债券基金（特别是陷入丑闻的Wamco）以折扣价交易，可能为灵活性更强的个人投资者提供投资机会。虽然专业基金经理在管理客户资产时受到监管限制，但个人投资者可以利用市场错位和估值机会。文章表明，当前的市场条件可能为债券基金投资创造有利的切入点。

title: Amazon Prime Day offers a glimpse into the U.S. consumer as shoppers navigate with pinched wallets
summary: Amazon Prime Day data reveals a 9.3% year-over-year spending increase despite consumers facing financial constraints from high inflation. Shoppers are prioritizing discretionary, long-lasting products while navigating limited budgets, suggesting changing consumer priorities. The event provides insight into how American consumers are adapting their purchasing patterns amid economic pressures.
content: Retail experts attribute the 9.3% year-over-year increase in spending to high inflation and shoppers purchasing more discretionary, long-lasting products.

zh.title: 亚马逊Prime Day为美国消费者画像，消费者在"钱包紧张"中精明购物
zh.summary: 亚马逊Prime Day数据显示，尽管消费者面临高通胀造成的财务压力，同比支出仍增长了9.3%。在预算有限的情况下，购物者优先购买可自由支配的耐用产品，反映出消费优先级的变化。该活动揭示了美国消费者如何在经济压力下调整其购买模式。

title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
summary: A Walgreens customer drastically reduced a $618 prescription cost to just $15 using a QR code coupon for a generic medication. The dramatic price reduction highlights the potential for consumers to access affordable generic alternatives through targeted discount codes.
content: “This medication was generic.”

zh.title: "感觉像医学奇迹"：一张二维码优惠券是如何将我618美元的沃尔格林处方降到15美元的？
zh.summary: 一位沃尔格林顾客通过使用通用药物的二维码优惠券，将618美元的处方成本大幅降低到仅15美元。这种惊人的价格下降凸显了消费者通过有针对性的折扣代码获得经济实惠的通用药物替代品的潜力。

title: Your health insurer shouldn’t decide your treatment plan. That’s what your doctor — and possibly AI — should be doing.
summary: The article argues that doctors and AI diagnostic tools, rather than insurance companies, should determine patient treatment plans. Digital health records integrated with AI systems could enable clinicians to make better-informed decisions by accessing complete patient histories.
content: With a digital health record, clinicians and AI-driven diagnostic tools would be able to see your full health history — and then make better decisions.

zh.title: 你的健康保险公司不应该决定你的治疗计划。那是你的医生——以及可能的人工智能——应该做的事。
zh.summary: 这篇文章辩称，医生和人工智能诊断工具而不是保险公司应该决定患者的治疗计划。与人工智能系统集成的数字健康记录可以让临床医生通过访问完整的患者历史来做出更明智的决定。

title: The AI trade cooled and oil sank. A closer look at Wall Street's volatile week
summary: Wall Street experienced volatility this week as AI stocks cooled and oil prices declined significantly. While tech stocks like Micron stumbled despite strong earnings, falling oil prices provided a silver lining for inflation concerns.
content: Micron finished the week in the red despite a blockbuster earnings report. But falling oil prices was good news for the fight against inflation.

zh.title: 人工智能交易降温，油价下跌。近距离观察华尔街波动的一周
zh.summary: 本周华尔街经历了波动，因为人工智能股票降温，油价大幅下跌。尽管微芯等科技股尽管盈利强劲但表现不佳，但油价下跌为通胀担忧提供了一线希望。

title: Tanker struck in Strait of Hormuz as U.S.-Iran tensions escalate
summary: A tanker was struck in the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions, occurring during a 60-day ceasefire period between the two nations. The incident undermines ongoing diplomatic efforts to resolve the conflict.
content: The attacks come as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-day ceasefire as they attempt to work toward a resolution.

zh.title: 油轮在霍尔木兹海峡遭袭，美伊紧张局势升级
zh.summary: 在美伊两国60天停火期间，一艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡遭袭，美伊紧张局势升级。这一事件破坏了正在进行的外交解决冲突的努力。

title: I had gallbladder surgery. After I got home, the hospital asked me for a financial donation. Is this ethical?
summary: A hospital solicited a financial donation from a post-surgery patient, raising ethical questions about fundraising practices following medical procedures. The request asked patients to honor specific caregivers through financial contributions.
content: “The letter asked whether I had a favorite caregiver and if I would like to make a contribution in their honor.”

zh.title: 我做了胆囊手术。回家后，医院要求我进行经济捐赠。这在伦理上是否恰当？
zh.summary: 一家医院向手术后患者索要经济捐赠，引发了对医疗程序后筹款实践的伦理问题。该请求要求患者通过财务贡献来纪念特定的护理人员。

title: Why investors may want to prioritize bond markets outside the U.S.
summary: Investment firms are encouraging clients to explore international bond markets as alternatives to U.S. markets, targeting countries with higher interest rates or distinct inflation trends. The strategy diversifies portfolios amid varying global monetary policies.
content: Allspring Global Investments is pushing clients toward countries with central banks that are raising interest rates or have different inflation dynamics.

zh.title: 为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场
zh.summary: 投资公司鼓励客户探索国际债券市场，作为美国市场的替代方案，目标是利率较高或通胀趋势不同的国家。该策略在全球货币政策差异中实现投资组合多样化。

title: American couple left New York City and bought a house in Italy for $13,000: 'We found a different way of life'
summary: An American couple relocated from New York City to Italy, purchasing a house in Abruzzo for just $13,000 after initially settling in the Czech Republic. Their move reflects a broader shift toward geographic arbitrage and alternative lifestyles abroad.
content: Cassandra Tresl and Alex Ninman moved in with Tresl's grandfather in the Czech Republic in 2020 and closed on a house in Abruzzo, Italy, in 2022.

zh.title: 美国夫妇离开纽约市,以13000美元在意大利买了一套房子:"我们找到了不同的生活方式"
zh.summary: 一对美国夫妇从纽约市迁居至意大利,在最初定居捷克共和国后,以仅13000美元的价格在阿布鲁佐购买了一套房子。他们的举动反映了地理套利和国外替代生活方式的更广泛转变。

title: Before there were Trump Accounts, SEED OK gave some newborns $1,000 — how researchers say the grants affected kids
summary: A state program called SEED OK distributed $1,000 grants to newborns, establishing a precedent for child investment accounts that influenced creation of Trump Accounts. Research examines the long-term impact of early financial assets on child development and economic outcomes.
content: Some state-sponsored programs paved the way for Trump Accounts, the new tax-deferred investing accounts for children.

zh.title: 在特朗普账户出现之前,SEED OK向一些新生儿提供了1000美元——研究人员称这些补助金如何影响了儿童
zh.summary: 一个名为SEED OK的州项目向新生儿分配了1000美元的补助金,为儿童投资账户建立了先例,这影响了特朗普账户的创建。研究检视了早期金融资产对儿童发展和经济成果的长期影响。

title: ‘She is retired’: Do I dip into my 401(k) to pay my mother’s $30,000 credit-card debt?
summary: An adult child considers withdrawing from their 401(k) to pay off their retired mother's $30,000 credit-card debt, rather than having her rely on limited Social Security income. The dilemma raises questions about retirement planning and intergenerational financial responsibility.
content: “I want her to live on her Social Security instead of using it to pay off her credit-card debt.”

zh.title: "她已退休":我是否应该动用我的401(k)来偿还母亲的30000美元信用卡债务?
zh.summary: 一位成年子女考虑从其401(k)中提取资金来偿还已退休母亲的30000美元信用卡债务,而不是让母亲依赖有限的社会保障收入。这个困境引发了关于退休规划和代际财务责任的问题。

title: SpaceX stock has cooled. Hiring for jobs in the space economy hasn't
summary: While SpaceX stock has lost momentum following IPO euphoria, the space economy labor market continues to thrive with robust hiring growth. The sector remains resilient even as broader hiring across other industries has decelerated.
content: The SpaceX IPO euphoria is over, but the bullish trend in space economy jobs remains in place within a labor market where many other sectors have slowed hiring.

zh.title: SpaceX股票已降温。太空经济工作岗位招聘并未放缓
zh.summary: 尽管SpaceX股票在IPO热潮后失去了动力，太空经济劳动力市场仍然保持繁荣，招聘增长势头强劲。即使其他行业的广泛招聘已经放缓，该部门仍然保持韧性。

title: Australia toughens kids' social media ban, doubles potential penalties for tech firms
summary: Australia has strengthened its children's social media restrictions and doubled potential penalties for non-compliant tech companies. Regulators are investigating major platforms including Meta, Google, Snap, and TikTok for possible violations.
content: eSafety is actively investigating ⁠possible non-compliance by five platforms: Meta's Instagram and Facebook, Google's YouTube, Snap's Snapchat, and TikTok.

zh.title: 澳大利亚加强儿童社交媒体禁令，将科技公司潜在罚款翻倍
zh.summary: 澳大利亚已加强其儿童社交媒体限制，并将不合规科技公司的潜在罚款翻倍。监管机构正在调查Meta、Google、Snap和TikTok等主要平台是否存在违规行为。

title: I’m a CPA and tell my clients to claim Social Security early. Am I giving them bad advice?
summary: A CPA questions whether recommending early Social Security claims to clients is sound financial advice, noting that few people actually delay claiming until age 70. The column explores the trade-offs between early claims and maximizing lifetime benefits.
content: “Only 8% to 10% of people wait until age 70 to claim.”

zh.title: 我是注册会计师，建议客户提前申领社会保障金。我的建议不好吗？
zh.summary: 一位注册会计师质疑向客户推荐提前申领社会保障金是否是合理的财务建议，指出很少有人真正推迟到70岁才申领。该专栏探讨了提前申领和最大化终身福利之间的权衡。

title: AI turbocharged the stock market. Now it’s firing up the economy.
summary: Artificial intelligence investment has driven significant stock market gains and is now fueling broader economic growth and GDP expansion. The AI sector's momentum resembles a modern gold rush, extending beyond markets into the real economy.
content: A modern-day gold rush is giving a big boost to U.S. GDP.

zh.title: 人工智能推动股市腾飞，现在正点燃经济增长
zh.summary: 人工智能投资推动了股市的显著增长，现在正推动更广泛的经济增长和GDP扩张。AI部门的势头如同现代淘金热，从市场扩展到实体经济。

title: Going back to the office may actually be better for you than working from home
summary: Research suggests that returning to the office, even part-time, may provide benefits over full-time remote work for employee well-being and productivity. The findings challenge the remote work trend and suggest hybrid arrangements could be optimal.
content: Returning to the office — even just a few days a week — might be what fully remote workers actually need.

zh.title: 回到办公室实际上可能比在家工作对你更好
zh.summary: 研究表明，即使是部分时间回办公室工作，也可能比全职远程工作更有利于员工的福祉和生产力。这些发现挑战了远程工作趋势，并表明混合工作模式可能是最优的。

title: Free summer holiday sport sessions offered in city
summary: Sheffield is offering free summer sports sessions for children across green spaces, including complimentary food and beverages. The community initiative promotes youth physical activity and wellness during school holidays.
content: The scheme will visit green spaces around Sheffield, with free food and drink also offered.

zh.title: 城市提供免费暑期体育课程
zh.summary: 谢菲尔德在公共绿地为儿童提供免费暑期体育课程，包括免费食物和饮料。这项社区举措在学校假期期间推促青少年的身体活动和身体健康。

title: Pinterest has taken a beating in recent years. This analyst thinks it's time to buy
summary: Pinterest stock has declined 24% year-to-date, but one analyst believes the sharp decline creates a buying opportunity despite mixed sentiment on Wall Street. The stock has underperformed significantly in recent years, though some analysts see value in the current valuation. The divergence in analyst opinions reflects ongoing debate about the platform's growth prospects and business fundamentals.
content: Pinterest has been fallen 24% this year, but analysts are split whether to buy or sell this stock

zh.title: Pinterest近年股价下跌。这位分析师认为现在是时候买入了
zh.summary: Pinterest股票今年迄今下跌24%，但一位分析师认为这次急剧下跌创造了买入机会，尽管华尔街情绪混合。该股票近年表现明显不佳，但一些分析师看到当前估值中存在的价值。分析师意见的分歧反映了关于该平台增长前景和商业基本面的持续辩论。

title: These stocks are the most oversold after a turbulent week for the market
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) and CME Group emerged as the most oversold stocks following a turbulent week in markets, driven by concerns over regulatory disputes involving perpetual futures trading. The sharp declines may have created oversold conditions that could present opportunities for contrarian investors. The regulatory uncertainty surrounding perpetual futures continues to weigh on these financial infrastructure companies.
content: Intercontinental Exchange and CME were among the most oversold stocks this week amid ongoing concerns over a regulatory spat concerning perpetual futures.

zh.title: 经历市场波动的一周后，这些股票最被超卖
zh.summary: 洲际交易所(ICE)和芝加哥商业交易所集团(CME)在市场波动的一周后成为最被超卖的股票，这是由于对涉及永续期货交易的监管纠纷的担忧。急剧下跌可能创造了超卖条件，为逆向投资者带来机会。围绕永续期货的监管不确定性继续困扰这些金融基础设施公司。

title: Big Tech is obsessed with smart glasses. Now it has to convince people to wear them.
summary: Smart glasses represent a potential breakthrough hardware for the AI era, but manufacturers must overcome consumer adoption barriers. Major tech companies are betting these devices will become essential, though market acceptance remains uncertain.
content: Smart glasses could become the definitive hardware design of the AI era — if consumers buy in to the idea.

zh.title: 大科技公司对智能眼镜着迷。现在它必须说服人们戴上它们。
zh.summary: 智能眼镜代表了人工智能时代一个潜在的硬件突破，但制造商必须克服消费者采用的障碍。主要科技公司押注这些设备将成为必需品，尽管市场接受度仍然不确定。

title: The memory shortage shaking Apple and Microsoft is 'existential crisis' for smaller players
summary: A surge in memory chip costs is forcing Apple and Microsoft to raise device prices, but the shortage poses an existential threat to smaller consumer electronics companies with less financial flexibility. The memory supply crunch is reshaping the competitive landscape of the tech industry.
content: While Apple and Microsoft raise prices on key devices to help cover the soaring costs of memory, smaller consumer electronics companies are in dire straits.

zh.title: 影响苹果和微软的内存短缺对小型企业来说是"生存危机"
zh.summary: 内存芯片成本的激增迫使苹果和微软提高设备价格，但这种短缺对财务灵活性较低的小型消费电子公司构成了生存威胁。内存供应短缺正在重塑科技行业的竞争格局。

title: Bank of America says these five stocks are best positioned for upside amid market uncertainty
summary: Bank of America analysts have identified five stocks they believe offer significant growth potential despite current market volatility. The stocks are positioned to benefit from broader market dynamics as uncertainty persists.
content: Analysts at Bank of America said these stocks have plenty of room to run.

zh.title: 美国银行表示这五只股票在市场不确定性中最有上升潜力
zh.summary: 美国银行分析师确定了五只股票，他们认为尽管当前市场波动，这些股票提供重大增长潜力。这些股票位置可以从更广泛的市场动态中受益，因为不确定性持续存在。

title: Straight women can’t get enough of gay romance stories like ‘Heated Rivalry’ and ‘Red, White & Royal Blue’
summary: Gay romance stories are experiencing explosive popularity among straight women readers, expanding the genre beyond its traditional audience. The trend reflects shifting reading habits and growing mainstream acceptance of LGBTQ+ narratives in popular culture.
content: Women aren't the protagonists or love interests in a subgrenre of romance focused on gay men. Still, they're consuming these stories in droves.

zh.title: 异性恋女性对《激情对峙》和《红白蓝色皇室爱情》等男男爱情故事爱不释手
zh.summary: 男男爱情故事在异性恋女性读者中获得了爆炸性的欢迎,将这一类型扩展到其传统受众之外。这一趋势反映了阅读习惯的转变和主流文化对LGBTQ+叙事的日益接受。

title: Trading in these two ETFs suggests inflation fears are overblown
summary: Recent ETF trading patterns suggest market participants believe inflation concerns may be overstated. However, crude oil volatility is complicating the typical signals that would confirm this thesis.
content: It could have been a big week for bond bears, if it weren't for crude oil.

zh.title: 这两只交易所交易基金的交易表明通胀担忧可能被过度夸大
zh.summary: 最近的交易所交易基金交易模式表明市场参与者认为通胀担忧可能被言过其实。然而,原油波动性使得通常会确认这一论点的信号变得复杂。

title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
summary: Berkshire Hathaway CEO Greg Abel became a U.S. citizen in a naturalization ceremony at an Iowa Cubs baseball game, completing a longtime transition from his Canadian birthplace. The ceremony represented one of dozens of international residents taking citizenship oaths.
content: Abel, a longtime Iowa resident who was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962, was among the roughly two dozen people from 16 countries who participated in an annual naturalization ceremony hosted by the Iowa Cubs Thursday night in Des Moines.

zh.title: 伯克希尔首席执行官格雷格·艾贝尔在棒球比赛上宣誓成为美国公民
zh.summary: 伯克希尔哈撒韦首席执行官格雷格·艾贝尔在爱荷华小熊队棒球比赛上的入籍仪式中成为美国公民,完成了从其加拿大出生地长期以来的过渡。该仪式是数十名国际居民宣誓入籍的其中之一。

title: How GE Vernova builds the massive gas turbines powering the AI data center boom
summary: GE Vernova's industrial gas turbines have become critical infrastructure for powering the surging energy demands of AI data centers. Major tech companies including Elon Musk's xAI and Microsoft are buying these turbines to fuel their massive computing operations.
content: GE Vernova turbines are powering Elon Musk's xAI Colossus 1 data center and Microsoft just bought seven to power its data center in Texas.

zh.title: 通用电气Vernova如何打造驱动AI数据中心热潮的巨型燃气轮机
zh.summary: 通用电气Vernova的工业燃气轮机已成为满足AI数据中心激增能源需求的关键基础设施。包括埃隆·马斯克的xAI和微软在内的主要科技公司正在购买这些轮机为其大规模计算运营提供动力。

title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
summary: Kohl's department store chain has suffered a dramatic decline from its position as a major retailer, losing both market relevance and its traditional customer base. The company is now undertaking a turnaround effort to rebuild its brand and competitive position.
content: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.

zh.title: 科尔百货如何走向衰落——以及如何重新获得市场地位
zh.summary: 零售连锁店科尔百货从主要零售商的地位大幅衰落，既失去了市场相关性，也失去了传统客户基础。该公司现正实施转型计划以重建品牌和竞争地位。

title: Alliant Credit Union's new checking account pays up to 2% APY — see how it stacks up
summary: Alliant Credit Union has launched a high-yield checking account offering up to 2% annual percentage yield with unlimited earnings potential. The product represents a competitive option for savers seeking better returns on cash deposits.
content: Alliant Credit Union's new jumbo high-rate checking account pays up to 2% APY with no cap on earnings. Here's what to know.

zh.title: Alliant信用合作社新支票账户最高2% APY——与其他产品的比较
zh.summary: Alliant信用合作社推出高收益支票账户，提供高达2%的年利率和无限收益潜力。该产品对于寻求现金存款更高回报的储户而言是一个具有竞争力的选择。

title: SpaceX’s new $11 billion ‘saving grace’ comes with a big catch
summary: SpaceX is pursuing an $11 billion opportunity by providing hardware access to competitors, but the strategy may undermine its own artificial intelligence ambitions. The move represents a strategic trade-off between near-term revenue and long-term AI dominance.
content: The company’s pivot toward offering hardware access to rivals could hamstring its own AI goals.

zh.title: SpaceX新推出的110亿美元'救星'方案隐藏巨大代价
zh.summary: SpaceX正在寻求通过向竞争对手提供硬件访问权来获得110亿美元的机会，但这一战略可能会削弱其人工智能野心。这一举措代表了短期收益与长期人工智能主导地位之间的战略权衡。

title: It’s a tale of two S&P 500s as rotation out of top tech stocks shifts into overdrive
summary: A significant rotation away from large-cap technology stocks has widened the performance gap between the equal-weighted and market-cap-weighted versions of the S&P 500 to its largest in six years. The trend suggests investors are rebalancing away from mega-cap dominance.
content: The equal-weighted version of the S&P 500 outperformed its traditional capitalization-weighted sibling this week by the widest margin in six years.

zh.title: 标普500指数的'双重'故事：科技股轮动加速演进
zh.summary: 大幅轮出大型科技股已将标普500指数等权版本与市值加权版本之间的表现差距扩大至六年最高水平。这一趋势表明投资者正在调整配置，远离超大盘股的主导地位。

title: China industrial profits stay resilient as economy leans on factories, exports
summary: Chinese industrial profits continue to hold steady despite broader economic weakness, as the country's economy increasingly relies on manufacturing and export sectors. However, growth remains fragile, constrained by a struggling property market and structural imbalances.
content: China's economic growth remains fragile, hobbled by a prolonged property downturn and deep structural imbalances.

zh.title: 中国工业利润保持韧性，经济愈加依赖工业和出口
zh.summary: 尽管经济总体面临弱势，中国工业利润仍保持稳健，因为该国经济日益依赖制造业和出口部门。但增长仍然脆弱，受困于房地产市场疲软和结构性失衡。

title: Saudi Aramco resumes oil loading at Ras Tanura in boost to supply
summary: Saudi Aramco has restarted oil loading operations at its Ras Tanura facility, providing relief to global energy supplies. The resumption comes despite regional tensions highlighted by an incident involving a Taiwan-registered vessel in the strategic Strait of Hormuz.
content: The Saudi oil loadings come even though a ship belonging to Taiwan's Evergreen Marine was hit by an unknown object in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday.

zh.title: 沙特阿美在拉斯坦杜拉恢复石油装运以增加供应
zh.summary: 沙特阿美已重启其拉斯坦杜拉设施的石油装运业务，为全球能源供应提供缓解。尽管发生了台湾籍船只在战略性霍尔木兹海峡事件导致的地区紧张局势，装运仍得以恢复。

title: Venezuela quake toll tops 900, search intensifies for hundreds trapped
summary: A major earthquake in Venezuela has killed over 900 people with hundreds still trapped under rubble. The disaster has exposed uneven relief efforts in the hardest-hit areas, creating frustration over the pace of recovery operations.
content: Frustration has mounted over the uneven pace of relief in some of the hardest-hit areas.

zh.title: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数超900人，搜救工作加紧寻找数百名被困者
zh.summary: 委内瑞拉发生大地震，已造成900多人丧生，数百人仍被埋在废墟下。这场灾难暴露了最受灾地区救援工作参差不齐，引发了人们对救灾进度缓慢的不满。

title: From concerts to train rides, bots are winning the ticket wars — but they're only part of the problem
summary: Automated bots are increasingly used to scalp tickets across concerts, train reservations, and other events, defeating efforts by consumers to purchase fairly. The issue highlights how technology is being weaponized against traditional ticket distribution systems.
content: From concerts to train reservations, automated bots have become the latest target in the fight against ticket scalping.

zh.title: 从演唱会到火车票，机器人正在赢得票务战争——但它们只是问题的一部分
zh.summary: 自动化机器人越来越多地被用于在演唱会、火车订票和其他活动中倒卖票务，打破了消费者公平购票的努力。这个问题突出了技术是如何被用来对抗传统票务分销系统的。

title: Red-alert heatwaves are becoming Europe's new normal. Investors are paying attention
summary: Europe is experiencing unprecedented heat waves with temperature records being broken across the continent and governments issuing critical danger-to-life warnings. Investors are increasingly recognizing climate-related risks as extreme weather events become more frequent and severe.
content: Temperature records were smashed across Europe this week, prompting several countries across the continent to issued high-level warnings about danger to life.

zh.title: 红色预警热浪正成为欧洲的新常态。投资者正在关注
zh.summary: 欧洲正经历前所未有的热浪，整个大陆的温度记录被打破，政府发布了关键的生命危险警告。随着极端天气事件变得更加频繁和严重，投资者越来越认识到气候相关风险。

title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies
summary: Anthropic disabled access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models due to government export control directives, but the Trump administration is allowing selective release of the Mythos model to certain companies and government agencies. The decision reflects tensions between national security restrictions and commercial AI competition.
content: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."

zh.title: 特朗普政府允许Anthropic公司向部分企业和政府机构发布Mythos AI模型
zh.summary: 由于政府出口管制指令，Anthropic公司禁用了对Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的访问，但特朗普政府允许向特定企业和政府机构有选择地发布Mythos模型。这一决定反映了国家安全限制与商业AI竞争之间的紧张关系。

title: SpaceX will join Nasdaq-100
summary: SpaceX is being added to the Nasdaq-100 index, making it one of the first companies to benefit from Nasdaq's newly adopted fast-track inclusion framework. The milestone represents significant public market recognition for Elon Musk's space company.
content: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

zh.title: SpaceX将加入纳斯达克100指数
zh.summary: SpaceX被纳入纳斯达克100指数，成为首批受益于纳斯达克新推快速纳入框架的公司之一。这一里程碑代表了公开市场对埃隆·马斯克太空公司的重大认可。
